settings.title: Settings
settings.workspace_dir_desc: Choose where to save your CV data locally.
settings.ai_provider_desc: Configure your AI model provider for CV generation.
settings.api_key_desc: Your API key for the selected provider. Stored locally only.
settings.model_desc: The model to use for generation.
settings.base_url_desc: API base URL. Leave empty for provider default.
settings.connection_failed: Couldn't connect. Verify your API key and base URL, then try again.
settings.migration_confirm: Found {{count}} file(s) in the current workspace. Move them to the new location?
settings.migration_conflict: {{count}} file(s) already exist in the target directory. Overwrite them?
settings.migration_success: Successfully migrated {{count}} file(s) to the new workspace.
settings.migration_partial: Migration partially completed. {{migrated}} moved, {{failed}} failed. Workspace path was not changed.
settings.migration_same_dir: Selected directory is the same as the current workspace.
settings.migration_first_run: Found CV files at the old default location. Click here to migrate them to the new workspace.

profile.title: Profile
profile.summary_ph: Brief summary of your professional background...
profile.project_description_ph: Describe the project and your contribution...
profile.education_description_ph: Describe your studies, achievements, or relevant coursework...
profile.load_error: Couldn't load your profile. Please try again.
profile.import_no_ai: PDF import needs an AI provider. Set one up in Settings first.
profile.delete_confirm_desc: This will permanently delete this entry. This can't be undone.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: Something went wrong loading this page. Click Retry, or restart the app if it keeps happening.

resumes.save_error: Couldn't save your changes. Please try again.
resumes.validation_error: Please fill in the job title
resumes.copy_error: Couldn't copy to clipboard. Your browser may have blocked it.

resumes.round_notes_ph: Any additional notes about this round...

resumes.keywords_help: Skills auto-extracted from the job description
